name: TS-Mask VLA: 2D Temporal-Spatial Masking for Vision-Language-Action Model with Effective Bridging

description: arXiv:2607.09818v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models aim to understand natural-language instructions and visual observations, and to generate and execute corresponding actions as embodied agents. Recently, autoregressive token-based action generation has driven the development of many representative VLA models. However, this paradigm often reduces action generat...
author: Shengzhuo Yang, Ronghao Yu, Chuanjie Lv, Linpeng Peng, Hang Yu, Jie Ren, Jiajun Lv, Yong Liu
